description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The unique identifier of the event. KOI.Event.source_log_type The source log type of the event (Alerts or Audit).
outputs.name: KOI.Event.id

outputs.description: Date The timestamp of the event in ISO 8601 format. KOI.Event.created_at
outputs.name: KOI.Event._time

outputs.description: The creation time of the event (audit logs).
outputs.name: Date
